CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT 1 PARISON TRUST, MAHMOOD AZAD DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005, 1013 and 1010.6. Service on November 21, 2022 fails to account for additional 2 court days for e-service.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
